Bash(python3 - <<'EOF'
import re

with open\(r'C:\\Users\\murde\\Desktop\\myBlog\\blog\\90. 아쿨맨 키우기\\강화 리스트.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# [![NAME]\(icon\) NAME ![]\(quality\)]\(https://www.wowhead.com/ko/item=ID/...\) 패턴
pattern = r'\\[!\\[[^\\]]*\\]\\\([^\)]+\\\) \([^\\[!][^\\[]*?\)\(?:!\\[\\]\\\([^\)]+\\\)\)?\\s*\\]\\\(https://www\\.wowhead\\.com/ko/item=\(\\d+\)/[^\)]+\\\)'

def replace_item\(m\):
    name = m.group\(1\).strip\(\)
    item_id = m.group\(2\)
    return f'[wow:{item_id}|{name}]'

new_content = re.sub\(pattern, replace_item, content\)
print\(new_content\)
EOF)
